name: Callista Weatherford
ai_summary: Callista Weatherford has three years of education experience including college GED programs and special education. She is relocating to Mesa, AZ and is passionate about advocating for underprivileged students.

transcripts.q3:
Hello, my name is closed. Whether Ford I have three years of experience, working in education, my first two years were working at a college and a GED program within that job. I worked with students from the age of 16 to 70. So broad range there. And my most recent years experience is in a special education classroom at a junior high. So Junior High age students from about ages 10 to 15. And in that classroom, I work with children.
 In on the Spectrum and children with varying physical disabilities as well. Working in education is a great Passion - especially working with children, who are underprivileged. I had a lot of experience with that working in the GED program as well as an eight special education program. I love providing opportunities to my students that they perhaps wouldn't otherwise have
